name: HIKEN DACHI: HACHIDORI NO YARI (SECRET STANCE: LANCE OF THE HUMMINGBIRD)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 4

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mob

This stance requires you wield a single melee weapon of a size category smaller than you and have at least one hand free. It is designed to help fight wielders of large weapons, keeping them in close quarters. This stance only provides a benefit against your Dodge target, provided they wield a reach weapon. When in a square adjacent to them, if they move away from you to attack you (even a 5 ft step), you may make an attack of opportunity of attack against them before they make the attack. The exception is if they take a withdrawal action.

Movement through instant transportation (such as the Shunshin no Jutsu or Hiyruusen no Jutsu techniques) will not provoke an attack of opportunity.
